source: Deterministic Baum-Welch (EM) re-estimation contract (Rabiner 1989 §III.C). A fixed 2-state / 2-symbol initial model and a fixed 20-symbol sequence are re-estimated for exactly maxIter=5 steps with tol=0, so the run is fully deterministic and non-degenerate. The fitted Pi/A/B and final log-likelihood are the language-neutral reproducibility contract; the EM guarantee (non-decreasing log-likelihood) and determinism are separately asserted as invariants in the test suite.
